text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: nwhitehorn

Log:
  Update the libpurple Slack module to a more recent version, which chases the recent deprecation of older Slack APIs used, for example, to fetch room members in multi-user chats.

  PR:		ports/253957
  Approved by:	nc
